seo.title: Auto Repair Shop Review Management | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your auto repair shop. Route unhappy customers to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Auto Repair Shops

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Auto Repair Shops
hero.subheading: Car repairs come with stress and money conversations. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the job, and catch issues privately first.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Auto Repair Shop Faces

items.heading: Clients only review when they’re upset
items.body: If the car runs fine, they move on. Complaints get posted.

items.heading: Pricing misunderstandings turn into 1-stars
items.body: Even honest work can look suspicious when the bill surprises them.

items.heading: A bad review creates trust issues fast
items.body: New customers read reviews to decide who they can trust with their car.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Auto Repair Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after pickup
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the customer picks up the vehicle.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Auto Repair Shops Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Protects your reputation when things get tense
items.body: Private feedback gives you a chance to fix issues before they go public.

items.heading: Fits your pickup and invoice workflow
items.body: Send the request right after the job closes.

items.heading: Helps reviews match the quality of your work
items.body: Happy customers get an easy path to leave a review.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will customers leave reviews for repairs?
items.a: Yes, especially after a job that went smoothly and solved the problem.

items.q: What happens if someone is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: Do I need an SMS system or shop software integration?
items.a: No. You can send requests manually by text or email and start immediately.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small shops.

items.q: Can I use this across multiple bays or locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location so feedback stays organized.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Auto Repair Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
